display.purpose: Hero statements, major CTAs, and unmistakable scores.

body.purpose: Reading copy, diagnostic explanation, and report content.

label.purpose: Metadata, status, page type, and compact UI labels.

shadows.name: ambient-low
shadows.purpose: Light lift for active drop areas, selected cards, and quiet hover state.

shadows.name: ambient-mid
shadows.purpose: Rare emphasis for active or foregrounded controls.

motion.name: quick-state
motion.purpose: Small hover, focus, and border-color transitions.

components.name: Primary CTA
components.description: High-value marketing or scan action. Pink should feel decisive, not decorative.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary{background:#ff2d6f;color:#fffdf7;border:1px solid #ff2d6f;border-radius:8px;padding:12px 18px;font-family:IBM Plex Sans,system-ui,sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0;transition:background 150ms ease-out,transform 150ms ease-out,border-color 150ms ease-out}.ds-btn-primary:hover{background:#171a16;border-color:#171a16;transform:translateY(-1px)}.ds-btn-primary:focus-visible{outline:3px solid rgba(255,45,111,.28);outline-offset:2px}

components.name: Utility Button
components.description: Dense report action such as export, share, or panel toggle.

components.name: URL Input
components.description: Primary scan field with calm paper styling and clear focus state.
components.css: .ds-url-label{display:flex;align-items:center;border:1px solid #ded4c2;border-radius:8px;background:#fffdf7;overflow:hidden;font-family:IBM Plex Sans,system-ui,sans-serif}.ds-url-label span{padding:16px 12px;color:#928b7b;border-right:1px solid #ded4c2;font-family:JetBrains Mono,ui-monospace,monospace;font-size:12px}.ds-url-input{min-width:240px;border:0;background:transparent;color:#171a16;padding:16px 18px;font:inherit;outline:0}.ds-url-label:focus-within{border-color:#416c38;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(65,108,56,.15)}

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Small status label for on-brand, watch, or flagged states.

components.name: Report Panel
components.description: Flat report surface organized by borders rather than decorative shadows.
components.html:
Voice scorecard

Page-wide metrics for the selected page.

components.name: Finding Highlight
components.description: Inline sentence mark for copy that needs review.

narrative.overview: Revisi is a focused editorial workspace for making brand voice inspectable. The design should balance expressive marketing with a calm, structured report UI that helps users scan, diagnose, revise, and rescore.
keyCharacteristics: Borders create structure before shadows do.

rules.name: The Annotation Rule
rules.body: Pink means editorial attention. Use it for flags, squiggles, highlights, and high-value CTAs.

rules.name: The Reading First Rule
rules.body: Report copy must beat visual drama. Do not compress findings or rewrites just to preserve a layout.

rules.name: The Grid Before Shadow Rule
rules.body: Reach for a divider, border, or surface change before adding a shadow.

dos: Do keep Revisi niche and sharp.
Do use pink for editorial attention.
Do let borders and grid lines organize report surfaces.
Do support WCAG 2.2 AA and non-color status cues.
donts: Don't make the product feel like generic AI SaaS.
Don't copy Grammarly's broad writing-assistant shape.
Don't make the report busy, dense, or enterprise-heavy.
Don't turn the brand into a playful copywriting toy.
Don't use gradient text, glass cards, side-stripe card accents, or repeated identical icon-card grids.
